items.summary: Add a negative prompt preset selector to the ImageGenerationForm component with at least 5 preset options (e.g., 'Low Quality', 'Anatomical Issues', 'Artifacts', 'Default Safe', 'None') that users can choose from a dropdown

Define negative prompt preset text values for each preset option that contain appropriate Stable Diffusion negative prompt keywords (e.g., 'Low Quality' preset includes keywords like 'low quality, blurry, pixelated, distorted'; 'Anatomical Issues' includes 'bad anatomy, deformed, mutated'; etc.)
Update the PoseCriteria type in backend/main.mo to include a negativePrompt field of type Text to store the selected negative prompt preset text

Update the prompt generation logic in App.tsx to append the selected negative prompt preset text to the generated comprehensive prompt, clearly separating it from the positive prompt (e.g., with a 'Negative prompt:' prefix or similar convention)
Add a negative prompt preset badge to the ImageDisplay component that shows the selected preset name alongside the existing parameter badges (body type, height, weight, age, ethnicity, art style)
Update the useSendQueries mutation hook to include the negativePrompt parameter when calling the backend sendQueries method
Create a migration.mo file to handle upgrading existing PoseCriteria records to include the new negativePrompt field with a default empty string value for backward compatibility
